_comment: Operational + embodied carbon factors for the electrical scope. Operational from BEIS / DEFRA Conversion Factors 2024 (UK grid mix). Embodied from ICE v3.0 — Inventory of Carbon and Energy, University of Bath. Cable values weighted (Cu conductor + insulation + sheath).
_standard: BEIS 2024 / ICE v3.0 / RIBA 2030 Climate Challenge

operationalCarbon._comment: BEIS 2024 average UK grid scope 2 — was 0.193 in 2023, 0.181 in 2022 expected to fall ~3-5% per year

Small Power._note: Plug load duty cycle ~30% over working hours

_embodied_comment: kgCO2e per kg of cable (ICE v3.0 weighted). For panels/transformers/UPS use kgCO2e/kVA derived from manufacturer EPDs (typical mid-range LV switchgear).
